name_en: Original lambskin 5NE026, new mini bento bag, classic Matelasse embroidery, a symbol of Miu style, practical and functional design, soft and premium leather, unique and novel style, cotton satin lining, detachable extension strap, can be used as an accessory, suitable for wrist as a handbag or shoulder bag, Dimensions: 15 X8.5 X 8 cm
